name: wisp
description: Anonymous, email-free accounts a real person can return to. Passkey-based, bot-filtered, honest about what it can't do.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build:widget && npm run knip && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test packages/server/test/app.test.ts packages/server/test/code.test.ts packages/server/test/pow.test.ts packages/server/test/session.test.ts packages/server/test/store.test.ts
